case_title: CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. QUINCY CARR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, QUINCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4,760.12 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, QUINCY NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE SERVED JAN-30-2026, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, QUINCY PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON APR-06-2026 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
DECLARATION TO UPDATE DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.50) SERVED JAN-15-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, QUINCY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, QUINCY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARR, QUINCY $5,085.50 PRINCIPAL, $4,760.12 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,845.62
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARR, QUINCY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,085.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
